items.title: Veteran analyst resets Big Tech ‘buy’ list for rest of 2025
items.description: For all the “bubble” talk on the AI trade, the truth is that it continues to defy gravity. items.title: My 74-Year-Old Dad Has $800K In His 401(k), And My Brother Keeps Telling Him to Move It Into An Annuity. Is This A Smart Move?
items.description: When someone hits their 70s, every financial move starts to feel permanent. One reader says her 74-year-old father has about $800,000 sitting in a 401(k) and a brother who keeps telling him to "lock it up" in an annuity. The pitch sounds convincing — ...
